mapper.select:
select ar.id, ar.user_id, ar.apartment_id, ar.overall_score, ar.environment_score, ar.traffic_score, ar.facility_score, ar.service_score, ar.value_score, ar.content, ar.is_anonymous, ar.create_time, ui.nickname as user_nickname, ui.avatar_url as user_avatar from apartment_rating ar left join user_info ui on ar.user_id = ui.id where ar.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} and ar.is_deleted = 0 and ar.status = 1
and ar.overall_score >= 4
and ar.overall_score >= 3 and ar.overall_score < 4
and ar.overall_score < 3
and ar.content is not null and ar.content != ''
order by ar.overall_score desc, ar.create_time desc
order by ar.create_time desc

select avg(overall_score) as avg_overall_score, avg(environment_score) as avg_environment_score, avg(traffic_score) as avg_traffic_score, avg(facility_score) as avg_facility_score, avg(service_score) as avg_service_score, avg(value_score) as avg_value_score, count(*) as total_count from apartment_rating where apartment_id = #{apartmentId} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1

select cast(overall_score as signed) as score_level, count(*) as count from apartment_rating where apartment_id = #{apartmentId} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 group by cast(overall_score as signed) order by score_level

select id, user_id, apartment_id, overall_score, environment_score, traffic_score, facility_score, service_score, value_score, content, is_anonymous, status, create_time from apartment_rating where user_id = #{userId} and apartment_id = #{apartmentId} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 limit 1
